titleStmt.title: SII 6.934: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 934. (A.R. No. 299 of 1899). ON THE TWENTY-SIXTH PILLAR OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākābdē bāṇakhākṣikṣitiparigaṇitē mē
ṣaśuklē tritīyāsaṁyuktē kāvyavārē harigiri
nilayaśrīnṛsiṁhasya viṣṇōḥ . prādāt gāścōḍamāṁ
bā viyadiṣugaṇitā mallabhūpālabhā¨ryyā
svāyu¨rvvaṁśābhivṛddhyai pratidinavihitākhaṁḍḍadīpa
sya hētōḥ . 1 Asyāssūnu¨rddi nēsmin® haridharaṇidha
rādhīśitu¨rddīpahētōḥ paṁcchāśat gāḥ pratā
pābhyudayavarayaśaḥkāṁttisaṁttāna
siddhyai . prādāt chāḷukyavaṁśakṣitivatitilaka
ścakrava¨rttī hyupēṁdrakṣōṇīṁdrassa¨rvvalōkāśra
yavitataguṇakhyātirācaṁdratāraṁ . 2
svasti . śrīśakava[¨r*]ṣaṁbulu 1205 gunēṁṭṭi vai
śākha śukla tritīyayu bhṛguvāramunāṁ
ḍu cāḷukyakulabhūṣaṇa sa¨rvvalōkāśraya
śrīviṣṇuva¨rddhana praśastiprasastulaina mallapadēva
maharājula bhā¨ryya cōḍamahādēvulunnu
Iyyama sutuṁḍu Upēṁdradēvacakrava¨rtthu
lunnu tamaku nāyurārōgyaiśva¨ryābhivriddhi
gānu śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuni divyasannidhini A
khaṁḍadīpālu reṁḍu veluguṭaku peṭṭina mō
dālu 100 Ī mōdālu nūṟuṁ goni Ī Akhaṁḍa
dīpālu reṁṭi neI Accheḍi golalu pallamivāri pa
llabōyuṁḍu Aradīpamunu mākanakōnā
ri Aradīvamunuṁgā neṟadīpamu 1 nu bhō
ṁḍāḍa dāmanabōyu koḍku pōte Aradīpa
munu boṭṭakāṭabōyuṁḍu Aradīpamunu
ṁgā neṟadīpimu 1 nu Ī dīpālu reṁḍunnu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāIgā naruvaṁgālāru . Ī dha
¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ
pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēva hi śatrusyā
t dha¨rmmassatru[¨r*]nna kasyacit . śrīśrīśrīḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.934 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
